title: Straddle calculator
acceptance_criteria: src/ingestion/straddle-calc.ts exports class StraddleCalculator that subscribes to the STREAM_TICKS Redis stream via streamConsume consumer group 'straddle-calc'
Constructor takes { clock: Clock, db: Pool, redis: Redis }
Maintains in-memory state per underlying: lastCePrice, lastPePrice, openStraddleValue (first snapshot of the day), previousRoc

Every 15 seconds (Clock-driven via VirtualClock.tick for testability): computes straddle_value = ce_ltp + pe_ltp; straddle_change_pct = (straddle_value - openStraddleValue) / openStraddleValue * 100; roc = (straddle_value - previousStraddleValue) / previousStraddleValue; acceleration = roc - previousRoc

Writes snapshot to straddle_snapshots: INSERT INTO straddle_snapshots (time, ...) VALUES ($1, ...) where time is clock.now() as a timestamp — NEVER uses DB DEFAULT now() so VirtualClock timestamps are correct
Publishes snapshot to STREAM_STRADDLE Redis stream via streamPublish with fields: time, underlying, expiry, atm_strike, ce_ltp, pe_ltp, straddle_value, roc, acceleration, vix
Read queries (if any) against straddle_snapshots always include a WHERE time > ... filter — never full-table scan
Handles missing CE or PE price gracefully (e.g., if only one leg ticked): skips snapshot for that 15s interval with WARN log rather than crashing
output_format: code plus plain English explanation of every non-obvious decision
